name: generate-3d-printable-models
description: Generate 3D models for 3D printing from images or text prompts using PrintPal API. Use when the user wants to create 3D printable models, convert images to STL/GLB/OBJ files, or generate 3D assets from text descriptions. Supports text-to-image via WaveSpeed when WAVESPEED_API_KE…
